_doc: Adjudication worksheet. For each value set 'status' to: 'mapped' (fill 'iri' with one or more vocab IRIs), 'flag' (mappable content but no vocab home -> coverage MISS / HITL), 'literal' (qualifier/residue, excluded from the coverage denominator). DEFAULTS: status='mapped' = exact lexical hit (spot-check); status='review' = a genuine lexical concept mention was found (pick IRI(s) from _candidates); status='literal' = predicate/condition with no lexical concept mention (residue by default -- promote to 'mapped'/'flag' only if a real concept is present). IMPORTANT: '_candidates' marked method='embed' are WEAK hints only -- BGE returns a 'nearest' term over the closed vocab even when the right answer is none, so an embed score is NOT evidence of mappability; rely on lexical hits. 'lexical_hit' flags whether any concept token matched.

aiact.value: in such a way, including with appropriate human-machine interface tools, that they can be effectively overseen by natural persons during the period in which they are in use
in relation to high-risk AI systems
